description: A tool crib attendant must manage the checkout and return of tools to maintenance technicians.

nodes.task_description: A technician requests a specific tool. Check the tool out to the technician in the inventory system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully logs the tool as checked out to the specific technician.

nodes.task_description: When the technician returns the tool, inspect it for damage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent inspects the tool and finds it in good condition.

nodes.task_description: Check the tool back into the inventory system and return it to its designated storage location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the tool's status to 'Available' and logs its return.
